title: The private version of you is the real one
caption:
Most men build two lives: the one people see and the one no one does.

The one no one sees is the real one.

The 11 PM scroll. The private tab. The way you treat people when there's nothing to gain from being good to them. That's the man you actually are.

And here's what a man trying to walk with God has to know: God already sees it. The work isn't to hide it better. The work is to close the gap.

One man. Same everywhere. That's what integrity means — not a moral checklist, but a whole life, not a split one.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

The thing you confess starts to die. The thing you hide keeps running you.

Send this to the man who's been living in two parts.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #realmen #accountability #james5 #christianity
